p.strong: Unaligned address 0x7fff3a2b8003 → scan until null or max_len

g.text: STEP 3 — Scan Bytes byte_offset..7 for Null Terminator
STEP 5 — Loop Until Null Found OR max_len Reached

div.p: ⚠️ Critical: errno = 0 BEFORE ptrace() call. If word == -1L && errno == 0 → valid data (0xFF×8), continue scanning. If word == -1L && errno != 0 → read error, return -1.

p.code: byte_offset = 0; // only skip prefix in FIRST word

div.p: Result: out[] = "/open/path", bytes_read = 9, out[9] = '\0' → print_string_arg outputs: "/open/path"
